project_type: pnpm monorepo with 17 Next.js/React apps + shared packages, Turborepo orchestration
build_system: pnpm 10.28.1 + Turborepo, each app has next build or tsc
test_framework: Vitest with backend/__tests__/ pattern, test files follow *.service.test.ts naming
verification_instructions: Run pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm lint to verify all gates pass
setup_instructions: pnpm install (already done), branch already created from wave4
contribution_requirements: TypeScript strict, no any, use @quant/shared-ui for UI primitives, @quant/brand for spring animations, framer-motion for page transitions, React Query for data fetching, Yjs for collab
key_patterns: Apps use Next.js App Router (src/app/page.tsx), shared-ui exports Button/Modal/Input/Card/Badge/AppShell/Sidebar/etc, hooks use React Query (useQuery/useMutation), API routes in src/app/api/, backend services in backend/ dir with Fastify, brand package exports spring configs, animations use framer-motion + AnimatePresence
directory_structure: apps/ has 17 apps (quantcalendar, quantdrive, quantdocs, quantmeet, quantneon, quantedits, quantmax, quant-mobile, status, marketing, admin, quantmail, quantchat, quantai, quantsync, quantube, quantads). packages/ has 50+ shared packages (shared-ui, brand, auth, ai, realtime, database, common, etc). Root has turbo.json, pnpm-workspace.yaml.
